subject: Bardock in Great Ape / Oozaru transformed form, roaring with mouth wide open (foil variant)
description: This foil variant shares the same artwork as the judge promotion version. A massive brown-furred great ape dominates the frame, head thrown back with mouth gaping wide in a roar. Teeth and open throat are visible. The body is enormous and fills most of the composition, with thick brown fur. Yellow energy bursts and motion lines radiate around the figure. The card frontmatter identifies this as Bardock with Great Ape and Bardock Saga traits, confirming this is the Oozaru transformation. No humanoid features are distinguishable — this is fully the beast form. The foil treatment may add shimmer effects not visible in the static image.
foreground: giant brown-furred great ape, mouth open roaring, massive body filling frame
background: yellow energy bursts and motion lines
vision_uncertainty: low-resolution-image — 260x364 source; fine detail not reliable
